titles.en: The meaning of the saying of al-Sadiq, peace be upon him: «People are two: one who relieves, and another who rests»
The meaning of the saying of al-Sadiq, peace be upon him: «People are two: one who relieves, and another who rests»

segments: : حدثني بعض أصحابنا، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام أنه قال: الناس اثنان: واحد أراح، وآخر استراح. فأما الذي استراح فالمؤمن إذا مات استراح من الدنيا وبلائها، وأما الذي أراح فالكافر إذا مات أراح الشجر والدواب وكثيرا من الناس.
arabic.text: : حدثني بعض أصحابنا، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام أنه قال: الناس اثنان: واحد أراح، وآخر استراح. فأما الذي استراح فالمؤمن إذا مات استراح من الدنيا وبلائها، وأما الذي أراح فالكافر إذا مات أراح الشجر والدواب وكثيرا من الناس.

segments: 1.	We were told by Muhammed bin Ali Majilawayh, may Allah be pleased with him, from his paternal uncle, Muhammed bin Abi’l-Qasim, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdillah al-Barqi, from his father, from Muhammed bin Abi Umayr, that he said: I was told by some of our companions, from Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him, that he said: People are (of) two (kinds): one who relieves, and another who rests. As for the one who rests, it is the believer; when he dies, he rests from this world and its tribulation. As for he who relieves, it is the disbeliever; when he dies, he relieves the trees, riding animals and many of the people.
en.basel-kadem.text: 1.	We were told by Muhammed bin Ali Majilawayh, may Allah be pleased with him, from his paternal uncle, Muhammed bin Abi’l-Qasim, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdillah al-Barqi, from his father, from Muhammed bin Abi Umayr, that he said: I was told by some of our companions, from Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him, that he said: People are (of) two (kinds): one who relieves, and another who rests. As for the one who rests, it is the believer; when he dies, he rests from this world and its tribulation. As for he who relieves, it is the disbeliever; when he dies, he relieves the trees, riding animals and many of the people.

narratorChain.raw: حدثنا محمد بن علي ماجيلويه - رضي الله عنه - عن عمه محمد بن أبي القاسم، عن أحمد ابن أبي عبد الله البرقي، عن أبيه، عن محمد بن أبي عمير، قال

parts.text: محمد بن علي ماجيلويه - رضي الله عنه -
أحمد ابن أبي عبد الله البرقي،
